$U(j\omega)=Z_{C}(j\omega)·k(j\omega)$
$U_{RMS}=e^{ j \varphi_{u} }=-j \frac{1}{\omega C}·I_{CRMS}e^{ j \varphi_{i} }$
$U_{RMS}e^{ j \varphi_{u} }=\frac{1}{\omega C}e^{ -j 90° }· I_{CRMS }e^{ j \varphi_{i} }$

$U_{RMS}=I_{CRMS}· \frac{1}{\omega C}=I_{CRMS}|X_{C}|$
$\varphi_{u}=\varphi_{i}-90°$

$I_{CRMS}=1A$
$I_{LRMS}=?$
$U(j\omega)=R·I_{R}(j\omega)$
$U_{RMS}e^{ j \varphi_{u} }=R e^{ j 0° }·I_{RRMS}e^{ j \varphi_{i} }$

$U_{RMS}=R·I_{RRMS}\to I_{RRMS}=\frac{U_{RMS}}{R}=\frac{3V}{7Ω}=\underline{0.43AU}$

KCL:
$I_{L}(j\omega)=I_{R}(j\omega)+I_{C}(j\omega)$
$\vec{I_{L}}=\vec{I_{R}}+\vec{I_{C}}$

$U_{RMS}=10e^{ j 0° }V=10V$
$\alpha_{u}=0°=0rad$

$I(j\omega)=I_{R}(j\omega)+I_{C}(j\omega)+I_{L}(j\omega)$
$\vec{I}=\vec{I_{R}}+\vec{I_{C}}+\vec{I_{L}}$

$I_{RRMS}=\frac{U_{RMS}}{R}=\frac{10V}{3kΩ}=3.33mA$
$I_{CRMS}=\frac{U_{RMS}}{|X_{C}|}=\frac{10V}{6kΩ}=1.67mA$
$I_{LRMS}=\frac{10V}{3kΩ}=3.33mA$

$R=3Ω$
$X_{L}=10Ω$
$|X_{C}|=4Ω$
$u(t)=2\sin(700t+45°)V$

Real power - ADDITIVE

$P=U_{RMS}·I_{RMS}·\cos(\varphi_{u}-\varphi_{i}) \ [W]$

Reactive power - ADDITIVE
$Q=U_{RMS}·I_{RMS}·\sin(\varphi_{u}-\varphi_{i}) \ [var]$
var- reactive volt power
$P_{s}=P_{R_{1}}+P_{R_{2}}+P_{R_{3}}+\dots$
$Q_{s}=Qs_{1}+Q_{s_{2}}+Q_{s_{3}}+\dots$

Apparent power
$U=U_{RMS}·I_{RMS} \ [V·A]$
NOT ADDITIVE
NO PHYSICAL MEANING!
